emails.subject: Re: update
emails.body: Re: update Thanks for your note and glad to hear you're feeling better. Yes we are all very sad about Jim's baby. Many years ago my sister had a child who was born two or three months early and lived for several days long enough to be held and loved but his lungs were apparently just not developed enough and they couldn't save him. I know how painful that was for them. And I have to admit that experience made me very anxious when things didn't go perfectly for you guys that first few days. I received papers from Julia regarding your options a week or so ago which I didn't send along because the next day Julia said HR had made a mistake in everybody's package and HR was sending replacement documents I haven't received the replacements yet but will ask. Stephanie has started and seems to be fitting in as far as I can tell at this stage. We're all super busy but more or less keeping up with the critical stuff. We'll look forward to seeing you soon.
